description: Explicit UI contract for the Provider portal /billing route.

header.title: Billing
header.subtitle: Sovereign-tier providers operate at zero cost; usage is reported for transparency.

cell.comment: v0.4 hard-codes 'verified'. Production should map per data-model.md (covered/paid → verified, due → pending, overdue → failed, disputed → review).

no_rows.body_text: No statements yet. The first statement will appear after your first month of usage.

non_negotiables: PageHeader has NO action buttons in v0.4 (sovereign-tier only).
No StatCards and no FilterBar on this page in v0.4.
Status pill is hard-coded to 'verified' in the prototype; production must remap from the persisted enum.
Amount cell renders the currency-code prefix verbatim (e.g. 'MUR 0'); do NOT strip it.
Tier tag uses uniform p-tag colour in v0.4 — production may colour-code by tier when paid tiers ship.
DataTable rows are non-interactive in v0.4 — do NOT bind onRowClick.
Sovereign-tier rows MUST NOT surface a Download invoice action — there is no invoice.
